category_sources: source_facts.description says MCP Server for interacting with Salesforce instances; official GitHub README describes Salesforce DX MCP Server as a Model Context Protocol implementation for Salesforce orgs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses Salesforce DX MCP Server in documentation and overview sections.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the Salesforce DX Developer Guide for general documentation and also contains README setup details.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official salesforcecli/mcp GitHub repository; official GitHub README identifies it as the MCP Server for interacting with Salesforce orgs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Salesforce MCP; official GitHub README describes Model Context Protocol, Salesforce orgs, npx @salesforce/mcp, toolsets, and TypeScript codebase.
